payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Vertical dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and rectangular frame, subtle vertical wood grain and a semi-matte finish; full panel visible in the crop with slight darker wear near the bottom; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
